name: elevated-ltv-callout
rationale: Refinance at 78% LTV (within 75-80% elevated band). F4.EL injectElevatedLtvBandCallout fires; admin-prelim Risk Factors section includes 75-80% band callout. Tests the elevated-band callout injection per R10-C-2. Distinct from D01 high-LTV bypass (>80%): D03 is admin-callout injection, NOT broker-facing generator bypass.
notes: Single-event sequence. Per Porter framing #3 Phase 4: F4.EL callout injection is the assertion target; verify callout TEXT is present in admin Risk Factors section + verify broker-facing path is STANDARD (not bypassed).
